title: YonKaGor of Undying
body:
# YonKaGor of Undying

This resourcepack adds YonKaGor Totems (SeaDrive and Tetra).  
Simply rename any Totem of Undying to **"SeaDrive"** or **"Tetra"**.

**Requires CIT Resewn (on 1.21.4 and earlier). Also works(should) on OptFine.**

## Credits
Resources for this resourcepack is taken from [YonKaGor YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@YonKaGor).

[![CIT](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/cit_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
[![Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/project/yonkagor-of-undying/gallery)
